name: Contoso Sales Analyst
description: AI-powered sales analyst that answers questions about sales performance, customer trends, and revenue metrics using natural language.

data_sources.name: contoso_sales
data_sources.description: Sales performance semantic model covering transactions, customers, products, and stores

data_sources.name: gold_lakehouse
data_sources.description: Gold-layer dimensional data for detailed analysis

sample_prompts: What were total sales last quarter by region?
Which products are trending up this month compared to last month?
Show me the top 10 customers by lifetime value
Why did sales drop in the South region last week?
What is the average order value by payment method?
